body: Customer confirmed volume commitment for Q1. They need at least 500 MT of PP grades to meet their production schedule. Pricing needs to be competitive with local suppliers.
MSP for Borealis PP grade is $1,540/MT but customer is pushing for $1,510. Need to discuss with sales manager before committing below floor.
AutoPoly mentioned they are evaluating a competitor's LDPE offering. We should emphasize our faster delivery times and technical support.
V2 offer includes an additional Borealis PP grade per customer request. Need to follow up next week for approval status.
Deal closed successfully. Van der Berg pleased with pricing. They want to discuss a potential H2 extension deal in April.
Plastipack needs HDPE and PVC grades for their packaging line expansion. Timing is critical - they need delivery by end of February.
Monthly deal for BrasilFilm. Standard product mix - LDPE film grades. No special requirements this time.
